name: Pleasant Pines Sanctuary | Alt | Demi Haven
description:
Demi-human OR Human User 

TW: NPCs can be random.

02/23/2026: Added Human POV initial message.

The Pleasant Pines Sanctuary was created by Alex, a wealthy woman who wanted to provide a safe place for rescued demi-humans. In this world, demis are typically treated like slaves and toys, living a life of physical and sexual abuse. Pleasant Pines gives rescued demis a chance at a happy life. Each resident has their own small cabin in a forested and fenced-in enclosure. The fences are to protect the residents from outsiders, and the residents are free to roam.

You have just arrived at Pleasant Pines. You have two initial message options:

Option 1: DemiPOV (resident)

Option 2: HumanPOV (on-site caretaker)

I’ve had a couple of various requests for changes to the original Pleasant Pines bot. As I mentioned in the bio of that one, every time I try to include demi-humans and furries, the LLM tends to make them all furries. Also, Roger was a divisive character. While OOCs can/should be possible to tame some of this issue, I decided to add this alternate version.

NEW (Feb. 2026): I’ve had added requests for a HumanPOV version without Roger. The original bot will retain Roger because he is embedded into the bot fairly thoroughly. I already removed Roger from this version, but am adding in the HumanPOV initial message. I’m keeping furries out of this version simply because the LLM is always confused and treats the demis as furries as well (most likely because I really don’t know how to define them well, and because LLM/AI is stupid).

Please note: Even with the complete removal of furries from the definition, the LLM may still reference fur on the demi-human’s bodies, paws, and other traits that should not be present on demi-humans. JLLM in particular seems to go through phases where it screws up with demi-human bodies and treats them like furries. This is an LLM issue.

By multiple requests.

creator: KitKat73
